user.title: Rain Radar
user.description: Set up Regnradar radar imagery with automation-ready rain forecast sensors.

data_description.rain_threshold: Minimum precipitation intensity in mm/h that counts as rain. This controls raining now, rain soon, and arrival calculations.
data_description.rain_soon_window: How far ahead, in minutes, Rain Radar should look before turning on the rain soon binary sensor.
data_description.sample_radius_m: Area around the configured location that forecast providers may use when sampling rain data. MET Norway currently uses point forecasts, so this is reserved for future provider improvements.
data_description.forecast_provider: Provider used for rain arrival, rain soon, and rain risk sensors. Radar imagery always comes from Regnradar.
data_description.radar_area: Regnradar image area used for the map overlay.
data_description.rain_risk_horizon_hours: How many hours ahead to inspect for the rain risk sensor. The default 12 hours matches the previous MET Rain Risk behavior.

reload_notice.title: Finish setup
reload_notice.description: Rain Radar will install and register the bundled dashboard card automatically. After the integration is added or updated, reload your browser once if the card is not visible immediately.

abort.already_configured: This forecast provider and location are already configured.
abort.unknown: The setup flow was interrupted. Start setup again.

error.unsupported_forecast_provider: This forecast provider is not supported yet.
error.unsupported_provider: This provider is not supported yet.
error.unsupported_radar_area: This radar area is not supported.
error.invalid_rain_threshold: Rain threshold must be zero or higher.
error.invalid_rain_soon_window: Rain soon window must be between 5 and 120 minutes.
error.invalid_sample_radius: Sampling radius must be between 0 and 10000 meters.
error.invalid_rain_risk_horizon: Rain risk horizon must be between 1 and 24 hours.

init.title: Rain Radar options
init.description: Update forecast provider, radar area, location, and rain thresholds.
